summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification completed from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. All five PRs remain open, non-security-sensitive, and independently owned by their existing PR workflows; no close, merge, label, fix, or PR-raising action is planned.

actions.reason: Independent open contributor PR with a concrete Feishu bug-fix scope, but no shared canonical and failing proof check. Keep it in the normal PR review/proof lane.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with a narrow CLI scope and active author ownership. It is not a duplicate or closure candidate in this inventory shard.
Independent feature-sized bug fix/config change with proof and passing checks, but compatibility impact remains a normal maintainer review decision rather than dedupe cleanup.
Independent broad WhatsApp feature PR with failing checks and unresolved review-bot history. It is not safe to close or merge from this inventory shard.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with a focused agents fix. It should remain in the normal author-owned review lane, not dedupe or closeout.
